sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89012" key="prosekpote/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεκ-ποτέον</orth>, (as if from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Προσεκπίνω</foreign>) <sense id="n89012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must swallow as well</tr_>, metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ δυσχερές</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1111c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
